parameters.query: INSERT INTO run_logs (workflow,status,detail) VALUES ('2-reconciliation','ok', jsonb_build_object('associates', {{ $('Build reconcile SQL').first().json.associates }}, 'risks', {{ $('Build reconcile SQL').first().json.risks }}));
UPDATE inbox SET status='failed' WHERE status='processing' AND attempts>=5 AND processed_at < now()-interval '1 hour' RETURNING id;
